London Has Fallen (2016)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $62,524,260Details
International Box Office $132,669,825
Worldwide Box Office $195,194,085
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $8,789,698
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $11,031,543
Total $19,821,241
Further financial details...

Synopsis

In London for the Prime Minister’s funeral, Mike Banning discovers a plot to assassinate all the attending world leaders.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$21,635,601 (34.6% of total gross)
Legs:2.89 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:32.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$60,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,490 opening theaters/3,492 max. theaters, 4.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $86,449,726

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 4th, 2016 (Wide) by Focus Features

March 2nd, 2016 (Wide) (France)
March 3rd, 2016 (Wide) (United Arab Emirates)

Video Release: May 31st, 2016 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong violence and language throughout.
(Rating bulletin 2413 (Cert #49180), 2/24/2016)
Running Time: 99 minutes
Franchise: Has Fallen
Geographical setting: London, United Kingdom
Plot point: Political Assassination, Secret Service Agent, Terrorism
Subgenre: Political Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay

Production Method:Live Action

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
